test-case.description: Should number providers
test-case.name: Add-Counter.Adds a counter property.Should number providers

test-suite.name: Add-Counter.Adds a counter property.Given JSON '<JsonInput>', adding a '<PropertyName>' counter should result in '<JsonOutput>'
test-suite.description: Given JSON '<JsonInput>', adding a '<PropertyName>' counter should result in '<JsonOutput>'

test-case.description: Given JSON '[{"name": "A"},{"name": "B"},{"name": "C"}]', adding a 'id' counter should result in '[{"name":"A","id":1},{"name":"B","id":2},{"name":"C","id":3}]'
test-case.name: Add-Counter.Adds a counter property.Given JSON '[{"name": "A"},{"name": "B"},{"name": "C"}]', adding a 'id' counter should result in '[{"name":"A","id":1},{"name":"B","id":2},{"name":"C","id":3}]'

test-case.description: Should add a property with a static value calculated when added
test-case.name: Add-NoteProperty.Add a calculated property value.Should add a property with a static value calculated when added

test-case.description: Should add multiple properties with a mix of value types
test-case.name: Add-NoteProperty.Add a calculated property value.Should add multiple properties with a mix of value types

test-suite.name: Add-ScopeLevel.Convert a scope level to account for another call stack level.
test-suite.description: Add-ScopeLevel.Convert a scope level to account for another call stack level.

test-case.description: Should calculate local scope
test-case.name: Add-ScopeLevel.Convert a scope level to account for another call stack level..Should calculate local scope

test-case.description: Should calculate a numeric scope
test-case.name: Add-ScopeLevel.Convert a scope level to account for another call stack level..Should calculate a numeric scope

test-case.description: Should calulate global scope
test-case.name: Add-ScopeLevel.Convert a scope level to account for another call stack level..Should calulate global scope

test-suite.name: Compare-Properties.Compares the properties of two objects
test-suite.description: Compare-Properties.Compares the properties of two objects

test-case.description: Should find the difference between PSProviders
test-case.name: Compare-Properties.Compares the properties of two objects.Should find the difference between PSProviders

test-suite.name: ConvertTo-SafeEntities.Encode text as XML/HTML, escaping all characters outside 7-bit ASCII
test-suite.description: ConvertTo-SafeEntities.Encode text as XML/HTML, escaping all characters outside 7-bit ASCII

test-suite.name: ConvertTo-SafeEntities.Encode text as XML/HTML, escaping all characters outside 7-bit ASCII.Should convert '<Value>' to '<Result>'

test-case.description: Should convert '💡 File → Save' to '💡 File → Save'
test-case.name: ConvertTo-SafeEntities.Encode text as XML/HTML, escaping all characters outside 7-bit ASCII.Should convert '💡 File → Save' to '💡 File → Save'

test-case.description: Should convert '💡 File → Save' to '💡 File → Save'
test-case.name: ConvertTo-SafeEntities.Encode text as XML/HTML, escaping all characters outside 7-bit ASCII.Should convert '💡 File → Save' to '💡 File → Save'

test-case.description: Should convert 'ETA: ½ hour' to 'ETA: ½ hour'
test-case.name: ConvertTo-SafeEntities.Encode text as XML/HTML, escaping all characters outside 7-bit ASCII.Should convert 'ETA: ½ hour' to 'ETA: ½ hour'

test-case.description: Should convert '🐛 fix bug' to '🐛 fix bug'
test-case.name: ConvertTo-SafeEntities.Encode text as XML/HTML, escaping all characters outside 7-bit ASCII.Should convert '🐛 fix bug' to '🐛 fix bug'

test-case.description: Should convert '🐛 fix bug' to '🐛 fix bug'
test-case.name: ConvertTo-SafeEntities.Encode text as XML/HTML, escaping all characters outside 7-bit ASCII.Should convert '🐛 fix bug' to '🐛 fix bug'

test-case.description: Should convert '🧪 new test' to '🧪 new test'
test-case.name: ConvertTo-SafeEntities.Encode text as XML/HTML, escaping all characters outside 7-bit ASCII.Should convert '🧪 new test' to '🧪 new test'

test-case.description: Should convert '🧪 new test' to '🧪 new test'
test-case.name: ConvertTo-SafeEntities.Encode text as XML/HTML, escaping all characters outside 7-bit ASCII.Should convert '🧪 new test' to '🧪 new test'

test-suite.name: Format-ByteUnits.Converts bytes to largest possible units, to improve readability
test-suite.description: Format-ByteUnits.Converts bytes to largest possible units, to improve readability

test-suite.name: Format-ByteUnits.Converts bytes to largest possible units, to improve readability.Formatting '<Bytes>', up to '<Precision>' digits after the decimal returns '<Result>', or '<SIResult> for SI'
test-suite.description: Formatting '<Bytes>', up to '<Precision>' digits after the decimal returns '<Result>', or '<SIResult> for SI'

test-case.description: Formatting '0', up to '16' digits after the decimal returns '0', or '0 for SI'
test-case.name: Format-ByteUnits.Converts bytes to largest possible units, to improve readability.Formatting '0', up to '16' digits after the decimal returns '0', or '0 for SI'

test-case.description: Formatting '1', up to '16' digits after the decimal returns '1', or '1 B for SI'
test-case.name: Format-ByteUnits.Converts bytes to largest possible units, to improve readability.Formatting '1', up to '16' digits after the decimal returns '1', or '1 B for SI'

test-case.description: Formatting '999', up to '16' digits after the decimal returns '999', or '999 B for SI'
test-case.name: Format-ByteUnits.Converts bytes to largest possible units, to improve readability.Formatting '999', up to '16' digits after the decimal returns '999', or '999 B for SI'

test-case.description: Formatting '0', up to '16' digits after the decimal returns '0', or '0 for SI'
test-case.name: Format-ByteUnits.Converts bytes to largest possible units, to improve readability.Formatting '0', up to '16' digits after the decimal returns '0', or '0 for SI'

test-case.description: Formatting '1024', up to '16' digits after the decimal returns '1KB', or '1 KiB for SI'
test-case.name: Format-ByteUnits.Converts bytes to largest possible units, to improve readability.Formatting '1024', up to '16' digits after the decimal returns '1KB', or '1 KiB for SI'

test-case.description: Formatting '1022976', up to '16' digits after the decimal returns '999KB', or '999 KiB for SI'
test-case.name: Format-ByteUnits.Converts bytes to largest possible units, to improve readability.Formatting '1022976', up to '16' digits after the decimal returns '999KB', or '999 KiB for SI'

test-case.description: Formatting '1048576', up to '16' digits after the decimal returns '1MB', or '1 MiB for SI'
test-case.name: Format-ByteUnits.Converts bytes to largest possible units, to improve readability.Formatting '1048576', up to '16' digits after the decimal returns '1MB', or '1 MiB for SI'

test-case.description: Formatting '1047527424', up to '16' digits after the decimal returns '999MB', or '999 MiB for SI'
test-case.name: Format-ByteUnits.Converts bytes to largest possible units, to improve readability.Formatting '1047527424', up to '16' digits after the decimal returns '999MB', or '999 MiB for SI'

test-case.description: Formatting '1073741824', up to '16' digits after the decimal returns '1GB', or '1 GiB for SI'
test-case.name: Format-ByteUnits.Converts bytes to largest possible units, to improve readability.Formatting '1073741824', up to '16' digits after the decimal returns '1GB', or '1 GiB for SI'

test-case.description: Formatting '1072668082176', up to '16' digits after the decimal returns '999GB', or '999 GiB for SI'
test-case.name: Format-ByteUnits.Converts bytes to largest possible units, to improve readability.Formatting '1072668082176', up to '16' digits after the decimal returns '999GB', or '999 GiB for SI'

test-case.description: Formatting '1099511627776', up to '16' digits after the decimal returns '1TB', or '1 TiB for SI'
test-case.name: Format-ByteUnits.Converts bytes to largest possible units, to improve readability.Formatting '1099511627776', up to '16' digits after the decimal returns '1TB', or '1 TiB for SI'

test-case.description: Formatting '1098412116148224', up to '16' digits after the decimal returns '999TB', or '999 TiB for SI'
test-case.name: Format-ByteUnits.Converts bytes to largest possible units, to improve readability.Formatting '1098412116148224', up to '16' digits after the decimal returns '999TB', or '999 TiB for SI'

test-case.description: Formatting '1125899906842624', up to '16' digits after the decimal returns '1PB', or '1 PiB for SI'
test-case.name: Format-ByteUnits.Converts bytes to largest possible units, to improve readability.Formatting '1125899906842624', up to '16' digits after the decimal returns '1PB', or '1 PiB for SI'

test-case.description: Formatting '1124774006935781376', up to '16' digits after the decimal returns '999PB', or '999 PiB for SI'
test-case.name: Format-ByteUnits.Converts bytes to largest possible units, to improve readability.Formatting '1124774006935781376', up to '16' digits after the decimal returns '999PB', or '999 PiB for SI'

test-case.description: Formatting '999999999999999999', up to '2' digits after the decimal returns '888.18PB', or '888.18 PiB for SI'
test-case.name: Format-ByteUnits.Converts bytes to largest possible units, to improve readability.Formatting '999999999999999999', up to '2' digits after the decimal returns '888.18PB', or '888.18 PiB for SI'

test-case.description: Formatting '1234567890', up to '2' digits after the decimal returns '1.15GB', or '1.15 GiB for SI'
test-case.name: Format-ByteUnits.Converts bytes to largest possible units, to improve readability.Formatting '1234567890', up to '2' digits after the decimal returns '1.15GB', or '1.15 GiB for SI'

test-case.description: Formatting '1234567890', up to '1' digits after the decimal returns '1.1GB', or '1.1 GiB for SI'
test-case.name: Format-ByteUnits.Converts bytes to largest possible units, to improve readability.Formatting '1234567890', up to '1' digits after the decimal returns '1.1GB', or '1.1 GiB for SI'

test-case.description: Formatting '1234567890', up to '0' digits after the decimal returns '1GB', or '1 GiB for SI'
test-case.name: Format-ByteUnits.Converts bytes to largest possible units, to improve readability.Formatting '1234567890', up to '0' digits after the decimal returns '1GB', or '1 GiB for SI'

test-case.description: Formatting '987654321000', up to '16' digits after the decimal returns '919.824765063822GB', or '919.824765063822 GiB for SI'
test-case.name: Format-ByteUnits.Converts bytes to largest possible units, to improve readability.Formatting '987654321000', up to '16' digits after the decimal returns '919.824765063822GB', or '919.824765063822 GiB for SI'

test-case.description: Formatting '987654321000', up to '12' digits after the decimal returns '919.824765063822GB', or '919.824765063822 GiB for SI'
test-case.name: Format-ByteUnits.Converts bytes to largest possible units, to improve readability.Formatting '987654321000', up to '12' digits after the decimal returns '919.824765063822GB', or '919.824765063822 GiB for SI'

test-case.description: Formatting '987654321000', up to '11' digits after the decimal returns '919.82476506382GB', or '919.82476506382 GiB for SI'
test-case.name: Format-ByteUnits.Converts bytes to largest possible units, to improve readability.Formatting '987654321000', up to '11' digits after the decimal returns '919.82476506382GB', or '919.82476506382 GiB for SI'

test-case.description: Formatting '987654321000', up to '10' digits after the decimal returns '919.8247650638GB', or '919.8247650638 GiB for SI'
test-case.name: Format-ByteUnits.Converts bytes to largest possible units, to improve readability.Formatting '987654321000', up to '10' digits after the decimal returns '919.8247650638GB', or '919.8247650638 GiB for SI'

test-case.description: Formatting '987654321000', up to '9' digits after the decimal returns '919.824765064GB', or '919.824765064 GiB for SI'
test-case.name: Format-ByteUnits.Converts bytes to largest possible units, to improve readability.Formatting '987654321000', up to '9' digits after the decimal returns '919.824765064GB', or '919.824765064 GiB for SI'

test-case.description: Formatting '987654321000', up to '8' digits after the decimal returns '919.82476506GB', or '919.82476506 GiB for SI'
test-case.name: Format-ByteUnits.Converts bytes to largest possible units, to improve readability.Formatting '987654321000', up to '8' digits after the decimal returns '919.82476506GB', or '919.82476506 GiB for SI'

test-case.description: Formatting '987654321000', up to '7' digits after the decimal returns '919.8247651GB', or '919.8247651 GiB for SI'
test-case.name: Format-ByteUnits.Converts bytes to largest possible units, to improve readability.Formatting '987654321000', up to '7' digits after the decimal returns '919.8247651GB', or '919.8247651 GiB for SI'

test-case.description: Formatting '987654321000', up to '6' digits after the decimal returns '919.824765GB', or '919.824765 GiB for SI'
test-case.name: Format-ByteUnits.Converts bytes to largest possible units, to improve readability.Formatting '987654321000', up to '6' digits after the decimal returns '919.824765GB', or '919.824765 GiB for SI'

test-case.description: Formatting '987654321000', up to '5' digits after the decimal returns '919.82477GB', or '919.82477 GiB for SI'
test-case.name: Format-ByteUnits.Converts bytes to largest possible units, to improve readability.Formatting '987654321000', up to '5' digits after the decimal returns '919.82477GB', or '919.82477 GiB for SI'

test-case.description: Formatting '987654321000', up to '4' digits after the decimal returns '919.8248GB', or '919.8248 GiB for SI'
test-case.name: Format-ByteUnits.Converts bytes to largest possible units, to improve readability.Formatting '987654321000', up to '4' digits after the decimal returns '919.8248GB', or '919.8248 GiB for SI'

test-case.description: Formatting '987654321000', up to '3' digits after the decimal returns '919.825GB', or '919.825 GiB for SI'
test-case.name: Format-ByteUnits.Converts bytes to largest possible units, to improve readability.Formatting '987654321000', up to '3' digits after the decimal returns '919.825GB', or '919.825 GiB for SI'

test-case.description: Formatting '987654321000', up to '2' digits after the decimal returns '919.82GB', or '919.82 GiB for SI'
test-case.name: Format-ByteUnits.Converts bytes to largest possible units, to improve readability.Formatting '987654321000', up to '2' digits after the decimal returns '919.82GB', or '919.82 GiB for SI'

test-case.description: Formatting '987654321000', up to '1' digits after the decimal returns '919.8GB', or '919.8 GiB for SI'
test-case.name: Format-ByteUnits.Converts bytes to largest possible units, to improve readability.Formatting '987654321000', up to '1' digits after the decimal returns '919.8GB', or '919.8 GiB for SI'

test-case.description: Formatting '987654321000', up to '0' digits after the decimal returns '920GB', or '920 GiB for SI'
test-case.name: Format-ByteUnits.Converts bytes to largest possible units, to improve readability.Formatting '987654321000', up to '0' digits after the decimal returns '920GB', or '920 GiB for SI'

test-case.description: Formatting '9685059', up to '1' digits after the decimal returns '9.2MB', or '9.2 MiB for SI'
test-case.name: Format-ByteUnits.Converts bytes to largest possible units, to improve readability.Formatting '9685059', up to '1' digits after the decimal returns '9.2MB', or '9.2 MiB for SI'

test-suite.name: Show-Progress.Performs an operation against each item in a collection of input objects, with a progress bar
test-suite.description: Show-Progress.Performs an operation against each item in a collection of input objects, with a progress bar

test-case.description: Displays progress
test-case.name: Show-Progress.Performs an operation against each item in a collection of input objects, with a progress bar.Displays progress
